Part.Source:
Event Start
tbCiotSubContratante.Visible = 0
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData'
txttomador.Width = 100 txtdestinatario.Width = 100 &OpeDesCod.TooltipText = "Destinatário da carga." txtcontratado.Width = 100 &OpeConCod.TooltipText = "TAC ou seu equiparado, que efetuar o transporte rodoviário."
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' &EmpCod.Visible = False &AcoesContratadoData = new()
&AcoesContratadoDataItem = new() &AcoesContratadoDataItem.Title = 'Novo Contratado' &AcoesContratadoDataItem.EventKey = !'NovoContratado' &AcoesContratadoDataItem.IsDivider = False &AcoesContratadoData.Add(&AcoesContratadoDataItem)
If (&OpeConCod <> 0) &AcoesContratadoDataItem = new() &AcoesContratadoDataItem.Title = 'Autenticar Contratado/Transportador' &AcoesContratadoDataItem.EventKey = !'AutenticarContratado' &AcoesContratadoDataItem.IsDivider = False &AcoesContratadoData.Add(&AcoesContratadoDataItem) Endif
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
txttomador.Visible = 0 txtdestinatario.Visible = 0 txtcontratado.Visible = 0
EndEvent
Event Enter
9 If 1=2
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If not &HasValidationErrors Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' WPOperacaoTransporte(!'Inicio', !'Viagem', false) EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Else Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' If &IsOk = True Do Case Case &OpeConCod.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Atenção!",'Um Contratado, homologado, deve ser informado.',DVMessageType.regular, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) &OpeConCod.SetFocus() &OpeConCod.SetFocus() Case &OpeDesCod.IsEmpty() And &OpeTipVia = PefServiceTipoViagem.Padrao Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Atenção!",'O Destinatário deve ser informado.',DVMessageType.regular, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) &OpeDesCod.SetFocus() Case &OpeTomCod.IsEmpty() And &OpeTipVia = PefServiceTipoViagem.Padrao Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Atenção!",'O Tomador deve ser informado.',DVMessageType.regular, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) &OpeTomCod.SetFocus() Case &OpeDtaFim.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Atenção!",'Deve ser informado alguma data prevista para o fim da viagem.',DVMessageType.regular, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) &OpeDtaFim.SetFocus() Case &OpeConRntrc.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Atenção!",'O RNTRC do Contratado deve ser informado.',DVMessageType.regular, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) &OpeConRntrc.SetFocus() OtherWise WPOperacaoTransporte(!'Inicio', !'Viagem', false) EndCase EndIf EndIf
EndEvent
Event 'WizardPrevious'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' WPOperacaoTransporte(!'Inicio', !'BemVindo', true)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoNovoTomador'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
WpNovaPessoa.PopUp('CLI', &OpeTomCod, '')
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoNovoDestinatorio'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
WpNovaPessoa.PopUp('CLI', &OpeDesCod, '')
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event ddo_AcoesContratado.OnOptionClicked
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do Case Case ddo_AcoesContratado.ActiveEventKey = !'NovoContratado' Do 'Do NovoContratado' Case ddo_AcoesContratado.ActiveEventKey = !'AutenticarContratado' Do 'Do AutenticarContratado' EndCase
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Sub 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData'
If 1=2
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &EmpCod = &WizardData.Inicio.EmpCod &OpeCod = &WizardData.Inicio.OpeCod &OpeSigCod = &WizardData.Inicio.OpeSigCod &OpeSubConRaz = &WizardData.Inicio.OpeSubConRaz &OpeSubConCiot = &WizardData.Inicio.OpeSubConCiot &OpeSubCon = &WizardData.Inicio.OpeSubCon &OpeResPgtFrt = &WizardData.Inicio.OpeResPgtFrt &OpeTomRaz = &WizardData.Inicio.OpeTomRaz &OpeTomCod = &WizardData.Inicio.OpeTomCod &OpeDesRaz = &WizardData.Inicio.OpeDesRaz &OpeDesCod = &WizardData.Inicio.OpeDesCod &OpeConCnpj = &WizardData.Inicio.OpeConCnpj &OpeConRntrc = &WizardData.Inicio.OpeConRntrc &OpeConRaz = &WizardData.Inicio.OpeConRaz &OpeConCod = &WizardData.Inicio.OpeConCod &OpeDtaFim = &WizardData.Inicio.OpeDtaFim &OpeDtaIni = &WizardData.Inicio.OpeDtaIni &OpeEmiGra = &WizardData.Inicio.OpeEmiGra &OpeTipVia = &WizardData.Inicio.OpeTipVia &FilCod = &WizardData.Inicio.FilCod
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Else LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &EmpCod = &WizardData.inicio.EmpCod &PesCod = &Context.PesCod &FilCod = &WizardData.inicio.FilCod &OpeCod = &WizardData.inicio.OpeCod &OpeEmiGra = True
If &OpeCod <> 0 Do 'LoadOperacao' Do 'VerificaSubContratante' do 'AttributesSecurityCode' Else &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon002_FilialFaturamento, &CfgVlr) &FilCod = val(&CfgVlr) If &FilCod.IsEmpty() &FilCod = &Context.FilCod EndIF &OpeSts = Status_Ciot.Digitando &OpeResPgtFrt = PagamentoEfrete.Contratante &OpeDtaIni = ServerDate() &OpeTipVia = PefServiceTipoViagem.Padrao do 'AttributesSecurityCode' TextCIOTStatus.Caption = 'OPERAÇÃO NÃO INICIADA' EndIf EndIf
EndSub
Sub 'SaveVariablesToWizardData'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &WizardData.Inicio.EmpCod = &EmpCod &WizardData.Inicio.OpeCod = &OpeCod &WizardData.Inicio.OpeSigCod = &OpeSigCod &WizardData.Inicio.OpeSubConRaz = &OpeSubConRaz &WizardData.Inicio.OpeSubConCiot = &OpeSubConCiot &WizardData.Inicio.OpeSubCon = &OpeSubCon &WizardData.Inicio.OpeResPgtFrt = &OpeResPgtFrt &WizardData.Inicio.OpeTomRaz = &OpeTomRaz &WizardData.Inicio.OpeTomCod = &OpeTomCod &WizardData.Inicio.OpeDesRaz = &OpeDesRaz &WizardData.Inicio.OpeDesCod = &OpeDesCod &WizardData.Inicio.OpeConCnpj = &OpeConCnpj &WizardData.Inicio.OpeConRntrc = &OpeConRntrc &WizardData.Inicio.OpeConRaz = &OpeConRaz &WizardData.Inicio.OpeConCod = &OpeConCod &WizardData.Inicio.OpeDtaFim = &OpeDtaFim &WizardData.Inicio.OpeDtaIni = &OpeDtaIni &WizardData.Inicio.OpeEmiGra = &OpeEmiGra &WizardData.Inicio.OpeTipVia = &OpeTipVia &WizardData.Inicio.FilCod = &FilCod &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson())
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
GravaOperacaoTransporteCapa.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&OpeCod,&WizardData) &WizardData.Inicio.EmpCod = &EmpCod &WizardData.Inicio.FilCod = &FilCod &WizardData.Inicio.OpeCod = &OpeCod &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson()) &isOk = True
EndSub
Sub 'Do NovoContratado'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
WpNovaPessoa.PopUp('CLI', &OpeConCod, '')
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'Do AutenticarContratado'
prcNovoEFrete_Login.Call(&Token, &ProtocoloServico, &StatusLogin)
If &StatusLogin = 200 prcNovoEFrete_Proprietario.Call(&OpeConCod, &Token, &StatusRet) If &StatusRet = 200 Do 'GetContratado' EndIf Else Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Erro!", &StatusLogin.ToString(), DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) EndIf
If not &Token.Trim().IsEmpty() prcNovoEFrete_Logout.Call(&Token, &StatusLogOut) EndIF
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'AttributesSecurityCode'
If 1 = 2
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If Not (&OpeTipVia = EFrete_TipoViagem.Padrao) &OpeDtaIni.Visible = False OpeDtaIni_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else &OpeDtaIni.Visible = True OpeDtaIni_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell DscTop' EndIf If &OpeDtaIni.Visible = False UnnamedTable17.Visible = False EndIf
TableDestin.Visible = (&OpeTipVia = EFrete_TipoViagem.Padrao)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Else &OpeDtaIni.Visible = (&OpeTipVia = EFrete_TipoViagem.Padrao) OpeDtaIni_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 DataContentCell DscTop' TableDestin.Visible = (&OpeTipVia = EFrete_TipoViagem.Padrao) TableTomador.Visible = (&OpeTipVia = EFrete_TipoViagem.Padrao)
If &OpeTipVia = EFrete_TipoViagem.TAC_Agregado &OpeDesCod.SetEmpty() &OpeDesRaz.SetEmpty() &OpeTomCod.SetEmpty() &OpeTomCnpj.SetEmpty() &OpeTomRaz.SetEmpty() EndIf EndIf
EndSub
Event &OpeTipVia.ControlValueChanged
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EndEvent
Event &OpeConCod.IsValid
If Not &OpeConCod.IsEmpty() Do 'GetContratado' EndIf
EndEvent
Event &OpeDesCod.IsValid
If Not &OpeDesCod.IsEmpty() &AuxPesCod = &OpeDesCod Do 'GetPessoa' &OpeDesRaz = &AuxPesRaz EndIf
EndEvent
Event &OpeTomCod.IsValid
If Not &OpeTomCod.IsEmpty() Do 'GetTomador' EndIf
EndEvent
Event &OpeEmiGra.ControlValueChanged
Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Atenção!",'Ao alterar o Tipo de Emissão, verifique se não existem pagamentos já cadastrados, pois se o tipo de emissão da OPERAÇÃO for diferente do tipo de emissão do PAGAMENTO, isso causará um ERRO na emissão do CIOT.',DVMessageType.regular, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,""))
EndEvent
Event &OpeSubCon.IsValid
&AuxPesCod = &OpeSubCon Do 'GetPessoa' Do 'VerificaSubContratante' &OpeSubConRaz = &AuxPesRaz
EndEvent
Event &OpeDtaIni.ControlValueChanged
If &OpeTipVia = EFrete_TipoViagem.Padrao And &OpeDtaIni < &Today Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Atenção!",'Data de início da viagem deve ser igual ou maior a data atual.',DVMessageType.regular, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) &OpeDtaIni.SetFocus() EndIf
EndEvent
Sub 'LoadOperacao'
For each order EmpCod,FilCod,OpeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where OpeCod = &OpeCod
&OpeTipVia = OpeTipVia &OpeDtaIni = OpeDtaIni &OpeDtaFim = OpeDtaFim &OpeConCod = OpeConCod &OpeConCnpj = OpeConCnpj &OpeConRntrc = OpeConRntrc &OpeDesCod = OpeDesCod &OpeResPgtFrt = OpeResPgtFrt &OpeSubCon = OpeSubCon &OpeSubConCiot = OpeSubConCiot &OpeSigCod = OpeSigCod &OpeTomCod = OpeTomCod &OpeEmiGra = OpeEmiGra
TextCIOTStatus.Caption = 'CIOT: ' + Trim(OpeNroCiot) + ' ' + UPPER(OpeSts.EnumerationDescription())
Exit EndFor If Not &OpeConCod.IsEmpty() Do 'GetContratado' EndIf If Not &OpeDesCod.IsEmpty() &AuxPesCod = &OpeDesCod Do 'GetPessoa' &OpeDesRaz = &AuxPesRaz EndIf
If Not &OpeTomCod.IsEmpty() Do 'GetTomador' EndIf
EndSub
Sub 'GetContratado'
&AcoesContratadoData.Clear() &AcoesContratadoData = new() &AcoesContratadoDataItem = new() &AcoesContratadoDataItem.Title = 'Novo Contratado' &AcoesContratadoDataItem.EventKey = !'NovoContratado' &AcoesContratadoDataItem.IsDivider = False &AcoesContratadoData.Add(&AcoesContratadoDataItem)
For each Order EmpCod,PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &OpeConCod
If PesTip = TipoPessoa.FISICA &OpeConCnpj = PesCpf Else &OpeConCnpj = PesCnpj EndIf
&OpeConRntrc = val(PesRntrc) &OpeConRaz = PesRaz.Trim()+' '+&OpeConCnpj.Trim()
If PesStsEfr = Status_EFrete.Homologado txtcontratado.Visible = 0 Else txtcontratado.Visible = 1 &AcoesContratadoDataItem = new() &AcoesContratadoDataItem.Title = 'Autenticar Contratado/Transportador' &AcoesContratadoDataItem.EventKey = !'AutenticarContratado' &AcoesContratadoDataItem.IsDivider = False &AcoesContratadoData.Add(&AcoesContratadoDataItem) EndIf
Exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'GetPessoa'
For each Order EmpCod,PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &AuxPesCod
If PesTip = TipoPessoa.FISICA &AuxPesCPFCNPJ = PesCpf Else &AuxPesCPFCNPJ = PesCnpj EndIf
&AuxPesRaz = PesRaz.Trim() + ' - ' + &AuxPesCPFCNPJ.Trim()
Exit When None &AuxPesRaz = 'N/A' EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'GetTomador'
For each Order EmpCod,PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &OpeTomCod
If PesTip = TipoPessoa.FISICA &OpeTomCnpj = PesCpf Else &OpeTomCnpj = PesCnpj EndIf
&OpeTomRaz = PesRaz.Trim()+' '+&OpeTomCnpj.Trim() Exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'VerificaSubContratante'
If &OpeSubCon = 0 tbCiotSubContratante.Visible = 0 Else tbCiotSubContratante.Visible = 1 EndIf
EndSub
